name: Zodiac Slayer
original_name: ชะตา ชาตะ
overview: Three individuals, each with unique birth fortunes, become bound by a shared destiny to thwart death and protect many lives. Guided by the prophecies of an old monk, the trio uncovers their intertwined fate and embarks on a critical mission. Together, they confront a formidable enemy destined to unleash chaos, racing against time to avert the impending disaster.
